problem id: b634898d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  01011111 -> 11000000
  01111110 -> 10000000
  00110010 -> 10000000
  00101000 -> 00000000
  01101101 -> 01000000
  01110101 -> 01000000
  01000111 -> 11000000
  11010110 -> 10000001
  01010110 -> 10000000

query: 01100011
predicted answer: 11000000
